title: myrtus deflexa
intro: Myrtus deflexa, also known as the Tasmanian myrtle, is a shrub native to Tasmania, Australia, belonging to the myrtle family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of M. deflexa include its potential to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
